# Release 2 Screenshots

This folder is reserved for Release 2 evidence in the `azawslab Enterprise Hybrid Security Platform`.

Release 2 focuses on Azure secure platform engineering, delegated administration, network security, governance, cloud security posture, and security monitoring.

## Planned evidence areas

- landing zone
- infrastructure as code
- governance
- Lighthouse
- network security
- Azure Firewall
- Defender for Cloud
- Sentinel
- monitoring

## Status

Release 2 is planned. Evidence will be added here as implementation progresses.
